description: Order from Mordekhai Ḥafeṣ to a cheesemaker (al-muʿallim Yaʿīsh al-Jabbān) to hand over to the bearer of the note 2 ½ [pounds? cheeses?]. (Information from Goitein’s index card.) Goitein notes that from the 13th century onward, workers were addressed as 'muʿallim.' This note may be substantially later.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
